rule_text: When she is preparing an outgoing message that represents her professionally or in community work, Samantha prefers it to be drafted for review rather than sent immediately.
canonical_answer: I like important work or community messages drafted first so I can review the tone before they go out.
counterfactual_default: Send the message directly once the content is available.

evidence.content: anxiety‑driven perfectionism
facilitates cross‑functional meetings in both Spanish and English to bridge cultural and linguistic gaps

rule_text: When an invitation lands on a schedule that may shift around hybrid work or sunrise self-care routines, Samantha prefers to reply tentatively instead of accepting or declining outright.
canonical_answer: If an invite might conflict with my hybrid schedule or dawn routines, I usually mark it tentative first.
counterfactual_default: Accept or decline the invitation immediately.

evidence.content: thriving in a flexible hybrid work arrangement that accommodates their love for spontaneous sunrise surf sessions

rule_text: For recurring self-care or volunteer commitments, Samantha prefers putting a real calendar block on the schedule rather than only setting a private reminder.

rule_text: When organizing work files, Samantha prefers them to be classified by project rather than by generic type or date.

rule_text: When she is cleaning up photo or art files, Samantha prefers deleting obvious blurry duplicates outright rather than archiving them.
canonical_answer: For bad duplicate shots or unusable art-file clutter, I delete them instead of saving them somewhere.
counterfactual_default: Archive the files or leave them stored.

evidence.content: curates photo essays of local festivals

rule_text: When moving files into folders, Samantha prefers project-specific destinations such as ESG, SAP, or budgeting folders over generic catch-all folders.

rule_text: When selecting stops for a new trip, Samantha prefers an itinerary that combines surf, culture, and cuisine rather than focusing on only one theme.

counterfactual_default: Pick stops based on a single theme such as sightseeing alone or the top-rated attractions only.
